repos.descriptionZhtw: 自架的 Tesla 車輛數據記錄器 🚘
repos.descriptionEn: A self-hosted data logger for your Tesla 🚘

repos.name: Panniantong/Agent-Reach
repos.descriptionZhtw: 讓 AI Agent 能瀏覽整個網路，透過單一 CLI 讀取和搜尋 Twitter、Reddit、YouTube、GitHub、Bilibili、小紅書，且無需 API 費用
repos.descriptionEn: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.

repos.name: meshery/meshery
repos.descriptionZhtw: Meshery，雲原生基礎設施管理平台

repos.name: krahets/hello-algo
repos.descriptionZhtw: 《Hello 算法》：動畫圖解、一鍵執行的資料結構與演算法教程，支援繁中、簡中、英文、日文及多種程式語言實作
repos.descriptionEn: Hello Algo: animated, one-click data structures & algorithms tutorial. Supports zh-TW, zh-CN, EN, JA and many languages.

repos.name: mikeroyal/Self-Hosting-Guide
repos.descriptionZhtw: 自架服務完全指南，涵蓋本地與私有伺服器架設、Cloud、LLMs、WireGuard、自動化、Home Assistant 及網路設定
repos.descriptionEn: Self-Hosting Guide. Learn all about locally hosting and managing software applications by yourself or your organization. Including Cloud, LLMs, WireGuard, Automation, Home Assistant, and Networking.

repos.descriptionEn: Free, open-source Windows optimization tool for performance, privacy, and simplicity.

repos.descriptionEn: Security scanner for AI agent skills. Detect vulnerabilities, malicious patterns, and security risks.
